H2: Car Magnet FAQs ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Car Magnets

Full-Color Magnetic Car Signs for Business, Marketing & Personal Use

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design & Order Custom Car Magnets Choose Size & Cut Options Upload Your Artwork Select Production Speed Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Car Magnets for Professional Marketing & Personal Expression

Transform any vehicle into a mobile advertising platform with our custom car magnets. These full-color magnetic signs are perfect for businesses looking to promote their services, real estate agents showcasing their brand, or individuals wanting to display team support or personal messages. Our car magnets combine vibrant printing quality with strong magnetic adhesion for reliable outdoor performance. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Available in multiple sizes and shapes, these magnetic signs stick securely to any ferrous metal surface while remaining completely removable. Whether you need temporary vehicle signage for business promotions or permanent magnetic displays, our custom car magnets deliver professional results that withstand weather conditions and regular vehicle use.

Each magnetic sign includes protective laminate coating for enhanced durability and UV resistance. From simple text designs to complex multi-color graphics, our car magnets showcase your message with sharp detail and lasting color quality that maintains its appearance mile after mile.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Order Process & Design Methods

Creating your custom car magnets is straightforward with our flexible design options. Choose between our online design tool or upload your completed artwork file to get started with your magnetic car signs.

Design Process

Use our intuitive online designer to create car magnets from scratch. Upload your logo or image, select from our clipart library, add text elements, and position everything exactly where you want it. The design interface shows real-time previews so you can see exactly how your magnetic signs will look before ordering. For customers with existing artwork, simply upload your print-ready file in EPS format to ensure the highest quality reproduction on your car magnets.

Once you add your car magnets to your cart and select shipping preferences, we'll email you a detailed proof for approval. This proof shows exactly how your magnetic signs will be produced, including colors, text placement, and overall layout.

Payment

All car magnet orders require full payment before production begins. We accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards for immediate processing. Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before your magnetic signs enter production.

Live Order Tracking

Monitor your car magnet order from approval through delivery with our Live Order Tracking system. You'll receive a unique tracking number via email that provides real-time updates on your magnetic signs as they move through design, production, and shipping stages. This system gives you complete visibility into your order status without needing to call customer service.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule for car magnets ranges from one to five business days, allowing you to choose the turnaround speed that matches your timeline and budget. Production time begins once your artwork file upload is complete and approved.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Get your car magnets in just one business day with our priority production option. Perfect for urgent promotional campaigns or last-minute marketing needs. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day production may be available in select cases - contact customer service to discuss rush options for your magnetic signs.

2 Business Days Express Production

Our express production delivers car magnets in two business days when you need fast turnaround but have slightly more flexibility. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the next business day. This option balances speed with cost-effectiveness for time-sensitive magnetic sign projects.

3 Business Days Standard Production

The most popular production choice for car magnets, our 3-day standard option provides fast delivery at no additional charge. This timeline works well for most business and personal magnetic sign projects where you need quality results within a week. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Save money on your car magnets by choosing our 5-day production option. Ideal when you're planning ahead and want the best value for your magnetic signs. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the next business day, and you'll receive the same high-quality results with extended timeline savings.

Note: Production time is separate from shipping time. If your order requires proof approval or gets flagged during prepress review, the production timeline starts from the approval confirmation date.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Cut Options & Finishing

Choose the ideal cut style for your car magnets based on your design requirements and aesthetic preferences. Each cut option offers different benefits for various applications and design styles.

Die Cut Car Magnets

Die cutting creates car magnets that follow the exact outline of your design or logo. This precision cutting method produces magnetic signs with custom shapes that eliminate excess material around your artwork. Die cut car magnets work especially well for logos, mascots, or designs where you want the magnet shape to match your graphics exactly. The cutting process maintains clean edges and professional appearance.

Square Cut Car Magnets with Rounded Corners

The standard finishing option for most car magnets, square cut with rounded corners provides a classic rectangular shape with softened edges. This cut style offers maximum magnetic surface area for strong adhesion while the rounded corners resist peeling and provide a polished appearance. The rounded corners also reduce the risk of catching on car washes or other objects.

Square Cut Car Magnets

Straight square cut car magnets feature sharp 90-degree corners for a crisp, geometric appearance. This cut option maximizes the magnetic material and works well for designs that benefit from clean rectangular borders. Square cut magnetic signs provide strong adhesion across the entire surface area and work well for text-heavy designs or rectangular logos.

All car magnets include protective laminate finish regardless of cut option chosen. This laminate coating protects your magnetic signs from UV fading, moisture, and surface abrasion during regular vehicle use.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Artwork Requirements & File Setup

Proper file preparation ensures your car magnets reproduce with sharp detail and accurate colors. Follow these artwork guidelines to achieve the best results for your magnetic signs.

Preferred File Types

For optimal car magnet quality, submit Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) or PDF files. These vector formats maintain crisp edges and allow unlimited scaling without quality loss. When submitting these files, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues during production of your magnetic signs. Maximum file size limit is 100 MB.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files for car magnet production. These raster formats work well for photographic elements or designs created in pixel-based programs. Ensure these files meet our resolution requirements for the best reproduction quality on your magnetic signs.

File Setup Tips

Set up your car magnet artwork at the exact proportional size you're ordering. Convert all text elements to outlines to prevent font problems. Only include bleed if specifically required for your design. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files. For die cut car magnets, clearly indicate cut lines in your artwork file so our production team can follow your intended shape precisely.

Vector vs Raster Guidelines

Vector art consists of mathematically defined lines and curves that can be enlarged infinitely while maintaining crisp detail - ideal for logos and text on car magnets. Raster images are made of pixels and have resolution limitations. For raster files, follow these specifications: 100% scale at 100 dpi minimum, 50% scale at 200 dpi or higher, 25% scale at 300 dpi or higher, or 10% scale at 600-1200 dpi for best results.

If you don't have print-ready artwork, our design recreation service can vectorize your logo or image starting at $15. This service creates high-quality vector artwork that we keep on file for future car magnet orders.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Shipping & Delivery

Your car magnets will be carefully packaged and shipped within 2-10 business days depending on your production and shipping selections. We use reliable carriers to ensure your magnetic signs arrive safely and on schedule.

Shipping Methods

Choose from multiple shipping options to match your timeline needs. Standard ground shipping provides economical delivery for car magnets within 5-7 business days to most locations. Expedited shipping options including 2-day and overnight delivery are available when you need your magnetic signs faster. All shipping times are separate from production times, so factor both timelines when planning your order.

Shipping Time Expectations

Economy shipping typically takes 5-10 business days for car magnet delivery. This cost-effective option works well when you're not in a rush and want to minimize shipping costs for your magnetic signs. Ground shipping delivers most car magnet orders within 3-7 business days and provides good value with reliable service.

Important Shipping Notes

Car magnets are shipped flat in protective packaging to prevent damage during transit. Large magnetic signs may require special handling or alternate shipping methods. International shipping is available for car magnets with extended delivery times and additional customs considerations. We provide tracking information for all shipments so you can monitor your magnetic signs from our facility to your delivery address.

For urgent car magnet projects, consider both production time and shipping time when selecting your options. Rush production combined with expedited shipping ensures the fastest possible delivery of your magnetic signs.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet Installation & Application

Proper installation ensures your car magnets stay securely attached while protecting your vehicle's finish. Follow these steps for best results with your magnetic signs.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the vehicle surface thoroughly before applying car magnets. Remove all dirt, wax, and debris from the area where you'll place the magnetic signs. Use soap and water followed by a clean, dry cloth to ensure the surface is completely clean. Avoid applying car magnets to freshly painted vehicles - wait at least 90 days for paint to fully cure before using magnetic signs.

Applying Car Magnets

Position your car magnet on the clean metal surface and smooth it down from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles. Press firmly around all edges to ensure complete contact between the magnet and vehicle surface. The magnetic signs should lay flat without any lifted corners or edges. Properly applied car magnets will stay in place during normal driving conditions and car washes.

Magnetic Sign Maintenance

Remove car magnets regularly to clean both the magnet and vehicle surface underneath. This prevents buildup of dirt and debris that can scratch your vehicle's finish. Store magnetic signs flat when not in use to maintain their shape and magnetic strength. Avoid exposing car magnets to extreme temperatures for extended periods, as this can affect magnetic adhesion.

Car magnets work best on ferrous metal surfaces like steel. They may not adhere properly to aluminum, fiberglass, or plastic vehicle parts. Test magnetic attraction before final application if you're unsure about surface compatibility. For additional vehicle signage options, consider our custom vehicle decals for non-magnetic surfaces.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Car Magnets?

Car magnets are flexible magnetic signs that adhere to metal vehicle surfaces for temporary or semi-permanent display of graphics, text, and branding. Made from magnetic vinyl material with a printed surface layer, these signs provide a removable alternative to permanent vehicle decals or paint. Car magnets are commonly used for business advertising, real estate promotion, political campaigns, team support, and personal expression on cars, trucks, and vans with ferrous metal body panels.

Design Your Custom Car Magnets Today

Create professional magnetic vehicle signage that promotes your business or displays your message with impact. Our car magnets combine durability, versatility, and visual appeal for effective mobile advertising that travels wherever your vehicle goes. Start designing your custom car magnets now with our easy online tools or upload your existing artwork for professional production.

Whether you need a single car magnet for personal use or bulk quantities for your business fleet, our production capabilities and fast turnaround times ensure you get the magnetic signs you need when you need them. Transform any vehicle into a powerful marketing tool with custom car magnets that deliver your message clearly and professionally.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Car Magnet FAQs

What material are car magnets made from?

Our car magnets are made from flexible magnetic vinyl material with a printed surface layer and protective laminate coating. This construction provides strong magnetic adhesion while allowing full-color printing and weather resistance for outdoor vehicle use.

What vehicle surfaces do car magnets stick to?

Car magnets adhere to ferrous metal surfaces including steel car doors, truck panels, and van sides. They will not stick to aluminum, fiberglass, plastic, or non-magnetic metal surfaces commonly found on some vehicle parts.

Can I leave car magnets on during car washes?

While car magnets can withstand automatic car washes, we recommend removing them before washing to prevent potential damage or loss. Hand washing around magnetic signs is generally safe, but removal during cleaning allows you to clean both the magnet and vehicle surface thoroughly.

How long do car magnets last outdoors?

Properly maintained car magnets typically last 2-3 years with regular outdoor use. The protective laminate coating resists UV fading and weather damage, while the magnetic material maintains its adhesion strength throughout normal vehicle use and storage.

What sizes are available for car magnets?

We offer car magnets in multiple standard sizes and can produce custom dimensions to fit your specific vehicle requirements. Popular sizes include door panel formats, bumper magnet dimensions, and large vehicle side applications for maximum visibility impact.

Can car magnets be die cut to custom shapes?

Yes, our die cutting service can create car magnets that follow your logo outline or custom shape requirements. Die cut magnetic signs eliminate excess material around your design and create professional-looking results that match your artwork exactly.
